allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(13\): skip ID columns in value audit \(useless unique-per-row tables\)

Excludes any column ending in "ID" \(ID, ENCOUNTERID, PROVIDERID,
DIAGNOSISID, FACILITYID, etc.\) from frequency counting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
docs\(phase-14\): complete Wave 1 — value audit review and foundation optimization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
